pr.title: mp: Match mpLib_80053ECC_Floor and update mpisland.h signatures
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: PR #2040 attempted to improve matching for src/melee/mp/mplib.c function mpLib_80053ECC_Floor by replacing a structured while(true)/break loop with explicit goto labels and hoisting loop locals. The PR body also claimed mpisland.h signature updates, but the loaded changed-file metadata and diff only show src/melee/mp/mplib.c. Automated report evidence showed partial improvement for mpLib_80053ECC_Floor from 89.53% to 94.89%, while the PR body claimed 100% on decomp.me. The author later said recent merged changes affected the match percentage and they needed to rework it, switching to draft. The PR closed unmerged in the loaded metadata.

key_files.role: Only changed file in loaded metadata and diff; contains mpLib_80053ECC_Floor loop-shape rewrite.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: void mpLib_80053ECC_Floor(int line_id, Vec* vec)

what_changed.text: In mpLib_80053ECC_Floor, the previous while(true) loop that followed groundCollLine[line_id].x0->prev_id0 while the previous line was a floor was rewritten into explicit labels loop_entry and loop_start with goto loop_start.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed while (true) loop with break
raw_diff: added goto loop_entry; loop_start: line_id = new_id; loop_entry:

what_changed.text: Locals shifted and new_id were declared at function scope before temp_r3; shifted is assigned line_id << 3 inside the loop entry.
The PR body claimed mpisland.h signatures were updated from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to proper types, but the loaded diff and changed-file metadata do not include mpisland.h.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Update mpisland.h function signatures from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders to proper types

smart_moves.text: The author explicitly recorded that the loop was changed for codegen, making the matching tactic searchable and reviewable rather than leaving it unexplained.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Match mpLib_80053ECC_Floor function using goto-based loop structure for correct codegen

smart_moves.text: The author later acknowledged that recent merged changes appeared to affect the match percentage and that the PR needed rework, which prevents over-trusting the initial match claim.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text issue comment: recently merged changes affected it's match %, will switch to draft for now

decomp_lessons.lesson: A goto-shaped loop can improve codegen for a difficult mpLib match, but this PR is weak evidence for accepting that shape as final source because the bot report only showed partial improvement and the author later said the PR needed rework.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: using goto-based loop structure for correct codegen
text_corpus author comment: gotta rework this one a bit

decomp_lessons.lesson: PR body claims about header or signature cleanup should be checked against changed-file metadata; here the claimed mpisland.h update is not supported by the loaded diff.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Update mpisland.h function signatures from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders to proper types

naming_conventions.text: New local names were generic/codegen-oriented: shifted and new_id. Existing names line_id, vec, temp_r3, groundCollLine, prev_id0, and CollLine_Floor were retained in the shown hunk.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replace a structured while(true)/break loop with labels and gotos to influence MWCC control-flow/codegen.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: goto-based loop structure for correct codegen
raw_diff: goto loop_entry; loop_start: ... goto loop_start;
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: Loaded evidence does not support accepting this as final style: automated report shows 94.89%, not 100%, and author later said it needed rework.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Hoist new_id out of the loop body and add a shifted temporary assigned from line_id << 3 before reading prev_id0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added int shifted; int new_id;
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The excerpt does not show how shifted is used later, so no broader lesson about this temporary should be inferred.

review_feedback.text: Author stated the PR likely needed rework because recent merged changes affected its match percentage and that they would switch to draft.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment by itsgrimetime at 2026-01-05T22:29:50Z: I think I gotta rework this one a bit, I think recently merged changes affected it's match %, will switch to draft for now

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev bot reported one unmatched-function improvement for main/melee/mp/mplib mpLib_80053ECC_Floor, bytes +16, from 89.53% before to 94.89% after.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot]: Report for GALE01

follow_up_queries: PR 2040 recently merged changes affected match percent

notes: Changed-file evidence is strong for the mplib.c hunk but does not support the title/body claim that mpisland.h signatures were updated.
The PR body claims ninja passed and mpLib_80053ECC_Floor matched 100% on decomp.me, but the loaded bot report shows only 94.89% and the author later said the match was affected and needed rework.
There are no review comments and no loaded reviewer approval or rejection rationale.
The PR was closed with merged_at null in metadata, so no acceptance or merge status should be inferred.
The body notes Claude Code generation; this is evidence about provenance of the PR text/code claim, not proof of correctness.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Changed-file metadata can disprove claimed header-signature scope

source_update_candidates.title: Require extra scrutiny for goto loop rewrites used only for codegen
source_update_candidates.text: This PR is a possible example where a goto-based loop rewrite was used as a matching tactic, but it only had partial bot-reported improvement and later author rework notes. Curator may consider whether existing natural-loops and matching-tactics standards already cover this or need an example warning that goto loop shapes require narrow verifier evidence and should not supersede natural loop forms without proof.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: goto-based loop structure for correct codegen
raw_diff: while(true) changed to goto loop_entry/loop_start
text_corpus author comment: gotta rework this one a bit
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential standards example only; not accepted as a new global rule because the PR did not show a final verified match in loaded evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: PR title/body may overstate mpisland.h changes
source_update_candidates.text: The title and body mention mpisland.h signature updates, but the loaded PR slice only contains src/melee/mp/mplib.c changes. Curator may want to mark this PR slice as having unsupported header-update claims if maintaining PR metadata quality notes.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Update mpisland.h function signatures from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS placeholders to proper types
source_update_candidates.reason: Prevents propagation of an unsupported changed-file/path fact.

rejection_notes: Do not promote 'mpLib_80053ECC_Floor matched at 100%' as an accepted validation result from this slice; loaded bot evidence shows 94.89% and the author later said rework was needed.
Do not record mpisland.h as a changed file for this PR slice; it appears only in title/body claims, not in changed-file metadata or diff.
Do not treat the goto-based loop as accepted project style; loaded evidence only supports that it was attempted for codegen and produced a partial improvement.
